cookie_banner_text: This site uses only technical cookies to ensure you the best experience. We do not use third-party cookies.
footer_about: A leaderboard platform for games built by the GameMaker Italia community.
index_hero_subtitle: Integrate online leaderboards into your GameMaker games in minutes. Free, secure, and serverless.
index_step1_desc: Add your game on the platform and receive a unique ID and secret key in seconds.
index_step2_desc: Use our simple HTTP calls to send and retrieve scores directly from GameMaker.
index_step3_desc: Your players' scores will be visible in global leaderboards, ready for competition.
index_step4_desc: Manage games, monitor statistics, and ban unfair players from your dashboard.
index_showcase_desc: Turn every match into an epic competition. Your players will climb the ranks, share their results, and feel part of a global community.
index_feature1_desc: Easy-to-use APIs for quick integration into your GameMaker games.
index_feature2_desc: No hidden costs. Offer online leaderboards worry-free, always.
index_feature3_desc: Stable platform with basic anti-cheat protection and regular backups.
index_feature4_desc: We handle the hosting. You write the game, we manage the leaderboards.
index_feature5_desc: Intuitive interface to manage games, scores, bans, teams, and statistics.
index_feature6_desc: Join our Discord for support, ideas, and collaboration with other devs.
index_feature8_desc: New features and continuous improvements for the platform.
index_faq1_q: Does it cost anything to use the platform?
index_faq1_a: No, the platform is completely free. You can register an unlimited number of games and manage your leaderboards at no cost.
index_faq2_q: How do I integrate the API into my GameMaker game?
index_faq2_a: We have detailed documentation with ready-to-use examples for GameMaker. Just copy the code, insert your API key, and you're ready.
index_faq3_q: Can I protect my leaderboards from hackers?
index_faq3_a: Yes, we offer moderation tools including player bans, suspicious score deletion, and server-side validation to prevent abuse.
index_faq4_a: The APIs are based on simple HTTP calls, so they support any engine or language that can make web requests. The documentation covers GameMaker in detail.
index_cta_desc: Join the developer community and give your players an unforgettable competitive experience.

scores_empty_desc: Scores submitted by users via the API will appear here. Check the documentation to get started.
scores_modal_delete_body: Are you sure you want to delete the score of
scores_modal_add_data: Data (a string associated with the score, max 64kb)
scores_modal_delete_selected_body: Are you sure you want to delete the

scores_modal_ban_body2: All their scores submitted on this game will be removed and they will not be able to submit new ones.
scores_modal_ban_body3: You can remove the ban later but the removed scores cannot be recovered.
scores_modal_ban_body4: Bans do not affect your other games.

leaderboards_modal_delete_warning: Warning: all scores associated with this leaderboard will be permanently deleted.
docs_param_tags: Tags associated with the score (optional, "default" is used as default value)
docs_param_insert_mode: Score insertion mode ("higher" [default], "lower"). For example, using 'higher', the player's best score will update the previous one, rather than adding a new entry.
docs_param_data: Optional string. To save custom data associated with the score (max 64kb)
docs_param_env: Environment ("production" [default] or "test"). Test scores do not appear in the production leaderboard.
docs_comment_score_action: scoreAction indicates whether the score was inserted or updated.
docs_comment_position: position indicates the rank of the newly added score.
docs_code_secret: The secret is obtained after creating a game
docs_note_add: Note: if you want to update the leaderboard right after submitting the score, you must do so only after the request has been processed, otherwise the new score will not be immediately visible.
docs_param_list_page: Result pagination (default 0, i.e. first page of scores).
docs_param_list_limit: Number of scores to display (default 10, max 1000 per page).
docs_param_list_player: Player ID or name (base64). If specified, only scores from this player will be returned.
docs_param_list_start: If specified, filters scores starting from this date (e.g. "2020-05-04" or "2020-05-04 22:20:20").
docs_param_list_end: If specified, filters scores up to this date.
docs_param_list_include_player: Player name (base64). If specified, includes the player's best score in the response, based on order/startTime/endTime filters. This is useful when you want to know the player's score even if they are not among the top rankings.
docs_param_list_hash: Required for protected leaderboards. sha1("game=" + game_id + "&leaderboard_id=" + leaderboard_id + secret).
docs_note1: Note 1: if 'sign' was used when submitting, each score will also have the 'sign' key.
docs_note2: Note 2: playerScore will be null if the 'includePlayer' parameter was not specified.
docs_code_create_comment: Put in the 'Create' event of an object.
docs_code_request_comment: This makes the request to fetch scores
docs_code_async_comment: Put in the 'Async HTTP' event of the same object.
docs_security_text: Each game has its own 'secret' that allows signing the score submission or leaderboard view request. The server automatically verifies that the transmitted data was actually generated with your secret, rendering HTTP traffic sniffing of your own game useless.
docs_errors_text: If a request fails, the response will be of this type:
docs_resources_desc: Includes ready-to-use scripts for sending and reading scores. To import, simply drag the file onto the editor.
cookie_section1_text: Cookies are small text files that websites visited by users send to their terminals, where they are stored to be then retransmitted to the same sites on subsequent visits. Third-party cookies are set by a website other than the one the user is visiting. This is because each site may contain elements (images, maps, sounds, specific links to web pages of other domains, etc.) that reside on servers different from the visited site.
cookie_section2_title: Types of cookies used by this site
cookie_section2_text1: This site uses exclusively technical cookies. These cookies are essential to allow you to navigate the site and use its features. Without these cookies, some services cannot be provided.
cookie_section2_bullet1_text: These cookies are temporary and are automatically deleted when you close your browser. They are used to maintain your session state (e.g., whether you are logged in).
cookie_section2_bullet2_text: We may use persistent cookies to remember your preferences (such as light/dark theme preference). These cookies remain on your device for a longer period or until you manually delete them.
cookie_section3_text1: We do not use third-party profiling cookies.
cookie_section3_text2: Our site may include links to third-party websites or services that may set their own cookies. For example, we may embed YouTube videos or links to social networks. These third-party sites have their own privacy and cookie policies, which we encourage you to review.
cookie_section3_text3: Regarding Google Analytics, if used, it is configured to anonymize your IP address. This means that Google will not be able to associate your full IP address with other data held by Google.
cookie_section4_text1: Most browsers accept cookies automatically, but you can usually modify your browser settings to refuse cookies if you prefer. If you choose to refuse cookies, you may not be able to fully use the interactive features of our site or other websites.
cookie_section4_text2: You can find information on how to manage cookies with some of the most popular browsers at the following addresses:
cookie_section5_text: By continuing to use our site, you consent to the use of technical cookies as described in this Cookie Policy. The cookie banner on the site informs you about the exclusive use of technical cookies.
cookie_section6_text: We may update our Cookie Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Cookie Policy on this page. Changes to this Cookie Policy take effect when they are posted on this page.
cookie_section7_text: If you have questions about this Cookie Policy, you can contact us through the channels available on our site.
privacy_section1_text: Welcome to {site}. Your privacy is very important to us. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and protect your personal information when you visit our website.
privacy_section2_text: We may collect the following information:
privacy_section2_bullet1_text: When you register for an account, we may ask you for personal information such as name, email address, and other contact information.
privacy_section2_bullet2_text: When you access our site, we may automatically collect certain information about your device and your use of the site, such as IP address, browser type, pages visited, and access times. This information is collected through technical cookies and server logs.
privacy_section3_text: We use the information collected to:
privacy_section3_item1: Provide, operate, and maintain our website.
privacy_section3_item2: Improve, personalize, and expand our website.
privacy_section3_item3: Understand and analyze how you use our website.
privacy_section3_item4: Develop new products, services, features, and functionalities.
privacy_section3_item5: Communicate with you, either directly or through one of our partners, including for customer service, to provide you with updates and other information relating to the website, and for marketing and promotional purposes (with your consent where required).
privacy_section4_text: We use technical cookies for the proper functioning of the site. For more information about the cookies we use, please see our
privacy_section5_text: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personally identifiable information to third parties without your consent, except in the cases described below:
privacy_section5_bullet1_text: We may share your information with third-party service providers who help us operate our website or conduct our business, provided that such parties agree to keep this information confidential.
privacy_section5_bullet2_text: We may disclose your information if required by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities (e.g., a court or government agency).
privacy_section6_text: We take reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is 100% secure and we cannot guarantee its absolute security.
privacy_section7_text: Depending on your jurisdiction, you may have the following rights regarding your personal information:
privacy_section7_item1: The right to access – You have the right to request copies of your personal data.
privacy_section7_item2: The right to rectification – You have the right to request correction of any information you believe is inaccurate. You also have the right to request completion of information you believe is incomplete.
privacy_section7_item3: The right to erasure – You have the right to request the deletion of your personal data, under certain conditions.
privacy_section7_item4: The right to restrict processing – You have the right to request restriction of processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.
privacy_section7_item5: The right to object to processing – You have the right to object to processing of your personal data, under certain conditions.
privacy_section7_item6: The right to data portability – You have the right to request the transfer of data we have collected to another organization, or directly to you, under certain conditions.
privacy_section7_text2: If you wish to exercise any of these rights, please contact us.
privacy_section8_text: We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page. We encourage you to periodically review this Privacy Policy for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy take effect when they are posted on this page.
privacy_section9_text: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, you can contact us through the channels available on our site.
terms_section1_text: Welcome to {site} ("Site", "Platform"). By accessing and using this Site, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions of Use ("Terms") and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree with any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this Site. The materials contained in this Site are protected by applicable copyright and trademark laws.
terms_section2_text: The Platform provides online leaderboards for games. Use of the platform is subject to the following conditions:
terms_section2_item1: You must be at least 13 years old to use the Platform. If you are under 18, you must have permission from a parent or legal guardian.
terms_section2_item2: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information, including your password.
terms_section2_item3: You agree not to use the Platform for any illegal or unauthorized purpose.
terms_section2_item4: You agree not to submit false or manipulated scores. We reserve the right to remove scores or ban users who violate this rule.
terms_section2_item5: You agree not to interfere with or disrupt the operation of the Platform or the servers or networks connected to the Platform.
terms_section2_item6: We reserve the right to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Platform (or any part thereof) with or without notice.
terms_section3_text: To access certain features of the Platform, you may be required to create an account. You must provide accurate and complete information during registration. You are solely responsible for all activity that occurs on your account.
terms_section4_text1: If you submit content to the Platform (e.g., usernames, scores), you grant {site} a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free license to use, reproduce, modify, and display such content in connection with the Platform.
terms_section4_text2: You are solely responsible for the content you submit and you warrant that you have all necessary rights to submit such content.
terms_section5_text1: The Site and its original content (excluding user-provided content), features, and functionality are and will remain the exclusive property of {site} and its licensors. The Platform is protected by copyright, trademark, and other laws of both Italy and foreign countries.
terms_section5_text2: Game names, logos, and other trademarks relating to games displayed on the platform are the property of their respective rights holders.
terms_section6_text1: In no event shall {site} or its directors, employees, partners, agents, suppliers, or affiliates be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including without limitation, loss of profits, data, use, goodwill, or other intangible losses, arising from (i) your access to or use of or inability to access or use the Platform; (ii) any conduct or content of any third party on the Platform; (iii) any content obtained from the Platform; and (iv) unauthorized access, use, or alteration of your transmissions or content, whether based on warranty, contract, tort (including negligence), or any other legal theory, regardless of whether we have been informed of the possibility of such damages.
terms_section6_text2: The Platform is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied.
terms_section7_text: You agree to defend, indemnify, and hold harmless {site} and its licensors and licensees, and their employees, contractors, agents, officers, and directors, from and against any claims, damages, obligations, losses, liabilities, costs, or debt, and expenses (including but not limited to legal fees), arising from or relating to a) your use of and access to the Platform, by you or any person using your account and password, or b) a breach of these Terms.
terms_section8_text1: We reserve the right, at our sole discretion, to modify or replace these Terms at any time. If a revision is material, we will try to provide at least 30 days' notice prior to any new terms taking effect. What constitutes a material change will be determined at our sole discretion.
terms_section8_text2: By continuing to access or use our Platform after any revisions become effective, you agree to be bound by the revised terms. If you do not agree to the new terms, please stop using the Platform.
terms_section9_text1: These Terms shall be governed and construed in accordance with the laws of Italy, without regard to its conflict of law provisions.
terms_section9_text2: Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights. If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable by a court, the remaining provisions of these Terms will remain in effect. These Terms constitute the entire agreement between us regarding our Platform and supersede and replace any prior agreements we might have had between us regarding the Platform.
terms_section10_text: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us through the channels available on our site.
